tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
if [ -f /var/log/services.jsonl ]; then
  :
else
  echo "File not found" >&2
  exit 1
fi
# use jq if available
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq -r 'select(.level=="ERROR") | .service' /var/log/services.jsonl \
    | sort | uniq -c | sort -k1,1nr -k2,2 \
    | awk '{count=$1; $1=""; sub(/^ /,""); print $0 ": " count}'
else
  # fallback naive parser for expected stable json format
  awk '
    {
      if ($0 ~ /"level"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"ERROR"/) {
        match($0, /"service"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"([^"]+)"/, m)
        if (m[1] != "") cnt[m[1]]++
      }
    }
    END {
      for (s in cnt) printf "%s %d\n", s, cnt[s]
    }
  ' /var/log/services.jsonl | sort -k2,2nr -k1,1 | awk '{print $1 ": " $2}'
fi
